glossary.definition: The canonical multi-service runtime boundary that hosts the Polyphony core, PostgreSQL, model organs, and workshop workers.
The single long-lived Polyphony runtime that owns subject continuity, bounded action, and workflow orchestration.
A bounded non-personal model or capability surface used by the core as a cognitive or operational organ.

key_strategy.item_key_space: Preserve legacy CF-* seam identifiers as stable backlog item keys during migration to backlog-engineer.
key_strategy.delivery_state_rule: Legacy intaken maps to implemented by explicit operator instruction; confirmed maps to planned; remaining candidate seams stay defined unless a carried migration gap blocks them.
key_strategy.source_traceability: Architecture and legacy planning inputs stay attached through registered source IDs, while current truth is read from backlog-engineer state after packet apply.

target_system.summary: One long-lived identity-bearing agent runs in ticks and owns bounded action, continuity, and workflow orchestration.
PostgreSQL is the canonical state kernel while the body and skills live in a Git-governed workspace.
Local model services act as organs behind the runtime rather than separate personalities.
Datasets, training, evaluation, and bounded promotion stay on the canonical workshop/runtime boundary.
Verification and deployment use the canonical pnpm toolchain, root quality gates, and containerized smoke path.

as_built.note: The delivered backbone already covers boot, runtime, state, perception, routing, bounded action, homeostat, operator API, model ecology, workshop, platform, and smoke harness seams.
These seams remain backlog-owned and must now progress through the backlog-engineer to dossier-engineer handoff instead of the legacy candidate table.
Legacy planning documents stay as supporting migration inputs only and are no longer the live backlog state.
Candidate seams stay defined until the new backlog/dossier workflow advances them through explicit specification, planning, and closure.
Current follow-up state after real-serving closure: CF-023 moved to implemented, while smoke-harness optimization continues as separate backlog delta CF-028.
